steps.title: Identify the elaboration cue
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with “Turning away from landscapes…”, which directly expands on the earlier claim that Johnson’s style underwent an abrupt transformation upon his return.

steps.title: Apply the cue to the answer choices
steps.content:
Choice A says the sentence elaborates on the previous sentence’s statement about a transitional moment in Johnson’s career, which matches the cue.
The other three either contradict this, describe something not discussed, or reverse the relationship.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
